name: Vector Pendulum, the Dracoverlord
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>竜</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ベクター<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ペンデュラム</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_tl: Vector Pendulum, the Dragon Demon King
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
Negate all card effects in your opponent's Pendulum Zones.

[ Monster Effect ] 
''This Overlord overran an entire world with his army of Dracofiends, using his Dragon Alchemy to convert all life into his terrible minions. The source of this power is unidentified, and probably extra-dimensional.''
pend_eff: Negate all card effects in your opponent's Pendulum Zones.
flavor: This Overlord overran an entire world with his army of Dracofiends, using his Dragon Alchemy to convert all life into his terrible minions. The source of this power is unidentified, and probably extra-dimensional.

mst: Negates the effects of your opponent's Spell Cards
